arts.ttl: Pavlovic in line to return to Bayern's starting line-up?
arts.sum: Aleksandar Pavlovic looks set to return to Bayern Munich's starting line-up against Heidenheim, according to Sky Germany.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich star Manuel Neuer likely played his last DFB-Pokal game
arts.sum: If Neuer chooses not to renew it, then it means that this was his last game in the DFB-Pokal with Bayern Munich. As a consequence for his red card, it has been made official (captured by @iMiaSanMia ) that Neuer would be banned for two consecutive matches following this one.

arts.ttl: Man Utd make HUGE push for Alphonso Davies
arts.sum: The Canada international is out of contract with the Bundesliga club at the end of the season and both sides have failed to come to terms over a new deal. Manchester United have reportedly ‘asked’ for a meeting with the entourage of Bayern Munich left-back Alphonso Davies, according to reports.

arts.ttl: Report: Man Utd make Alphonso Davies move ahead of possible summer transfer
arts.sum: Man Utd have reportedly requested a meeting with Bayern Munich left-back Alphonso Davies to try beat Real Madrid to a free transfer.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Man United and Liverpool have just contacted representatives of 'unbelievable' Bayern Munich player
Real Madrid, Man United 'suffer major blow' in pursuit of Bayern Munich's Alphonso Davies
arts.sum: Bayern Munich have allegedly 'made significant progress' in their attempts to sign Alphonso Davies to a new contract amid interest from Manchester United and Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Weekend Warm-up Show Season 4, Episode 21: Let’s talk about those juicy rumors linking Alphonso Davies to a contract extension at Bayern Munich; Should Bayern Munich approach Tom Bischof?; and MORE!
arts.sum: Be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany. Let’s check in on how we are feeling about the Bayern Munich wingers.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid, Man United 'set to lock horns for 21-year-old' after major Alphonso Davies setback
arts.sum: Real Madrid plan to battle Manchester United for the signature of Bournemouth left-back Milos Kerkez next summer, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Bayern Munich, Real Madrid, FC Barcelona engaged in battle for Alphonso Davies?; Barca to go all out for Viktor Gyökeres?; Manchester United chasing ex-Bayern prospect?; Arsenal eyeing PSG star; and MORE!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich star Alphonso Davies will be the most sought after left-back on the transfer market next summer and if the Bavarians want to keep the Canadian, they will likely have to fend off aggressive efforts from both FC Barcelona and Real Madrid . Real Madrid have been working on the signing of Bayern Munich speedster Alphonso Davies for quite some time now.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich only needs to agree on a salary for Jamal Musiala to confirm contract extension
arts.sum: Bayern Munich has clearly indicated their intention to extend Jamal Musiala’s contract. Be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany.
